scripts.package: bun run build && PYTHON=/usr/bin/python3 PYTHON_PATH=/usr/bin/python3 electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs
scripts.package:unsigned: bun run build && PYTHON=/usr/bin/python3 PYTHON_PATH=/usr/bin/python3 CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs
scripts.package:mac: bun run build && PYTHON=/usr/bin/python3 PYTHON_PATH=/usr/bin/python3 electron-builder --mac --config electron-builder.config.cjs
scripts.package:install: bun run package:unsigned && bun run install:mac
scripts.publish:mac: bun run build && PYTHON=/usr/bin/python3 PYTHON_PATH=/usr/bin/python3 CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --mac --config electron-builder.config.cjs --publish always
